name: Azure Activity — Failed operations
description: All failed ARM operations in the last 24 h
query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Failed'
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId, Caller, Properties
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc

name: VM errors (Event log)
description: Windows Event Log errors from all VMs
query:
Event
| where EventLevelName == 'Error'
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, RenderedDescription
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc

name: Failed sign-ins (Syslog / Security)
query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, LogonTypeName, FailureReason
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc

name: Syslog — errors and warnings
description: Linux syslog entries at Error or Warning level
query:
Syslog
| where SeverityLevel in ('err', 'crit', 'alert', 'emerg', 'warning')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Facility, SeverityLevel, SyslogMessage
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc

name: NSG flow — denied traffic
description: Denied network flows from NSG flow logs (requires NSG flow logs enabled)
query:
AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL
| where FlowStatus_s == 'D'
| project TimeGenerated, SrcIP_s, DestIP_s, DestPort_d, L7Protocol_s, NSGRule_s
| top 100 by TimeGenerated desc

name: SQL Audit — failed logins
description: SQL Server failed login attempts (requires SQL Audit to Log Analytics)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'SERVERS' and Category == 'SQLSecurityAuditEvents'
| where action_name_s == 'LOGIN FAILED'
| project TimeGenerated, LogicalServerName_s, client_ip_s, database_principal_name_s, server_principal_name_s
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc

name: WAF — blocked requests
description: Application Gateway WAF blocks (requires WAF diag settings to workspace)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'APPLICATIONGATEWAYS' and OperationName == 'ApplicationGatewayFirewall'
| where action_s == 'Blocked'
| project TimeGenerated, hostname_s, requestUri_s, ruleGroup_s, ruleId_s, clientIp_s
| top 100 by TimeGenerated desc

name: Heartbeat — stale agents
description: Agents that haven't sent a heartbeat in the last 15 minutes
query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| where LastHeartbeat < ago(15m)
| order by LastHeartbeat asc

name: AzureActivity — resource changes
description: All resource write / delete operations today
query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Succeeded' and OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'delete')
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId, Caller
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc

name: VM performance — top CPU
description: Top 10 VMs by average CPU over last hour
query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Processor' and CounterName == '% Processor Time' and InstanceName == '_Total'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgCPU desc
